message:
fix(actor,gen_server): honour pre-stop state in actor/server run loops

run_actor_loop and run_gen_server_loop unconditionally set state to
Running on entry, overriding Stopping set by stop() before the task was
scheduled. This caused the poll_fn Stopping guard to never trigger,
leaving the task permanently Pending.

Fix: only transition Created→Running; preserve Stopping if already set.
Also skip on_start in gen_server when pre-stopped, matching test intent.

Additionally fix 5 clippy lints in grpc_production_features.rs
(unchecked_time_subtraction, match_wildcard_for_single_variants) and
1 uninlined_format_args in nightly_stress_soak_automation.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
